study_title: App-Supported Quit Program With Nicotine Patch (QUIT-PATCH)
design_summary: 10-week, single-arm study combining a quit-coaching app with a standard course of nicotine patches. Participants set a quit date within 30 days of enrolling and check in through the app daily.

criteria.probe: To start, how old are you?

criteria.text: Currently smokes 10 or more cigarettes per day, on average.
criteria.probe: On an average day, how many cigarettes do you smoke?
criteria.unknown_rule: If the participant cannot give a usable estimate of cigarettes per day, INC2 is unknown.

criteria.text: Has smoked for at least 1 year.
criteria.probe: How long have you been smoking?

criteria.text: Willing to set a quit date within the next 30 days.
criteria.probe: Would you be willing to set a quit date within the next 30 days?

criteria.text: Owns a smartphone and is willing to check in through the study app daily.
criteria.probe: Do you own a smartphone, and would you be willing to do a short daily check-in in our app?

criteria.text: Willing to participate for the full 10 weeks.
criteria.probe: The program runs a full 10 weeks - is that a commitment you can make?

criteria.text: Currently pregnant or breastfeeding, or planning pregnancy within the next 6 months.
criteria.probe: Are you currently pregnant or breastfeeding, or planning a pregnancy in the next six months?

criteria.text: Heart attack or stroke within the past 3 months.
criteria.probe: Have you had a heart attack or stroke in the past three months?

criteria.text: Currently using another quit medication or nicotine replacement product (for example varenicline, bupropion, nicotine gum, lozenges, or patches).
criteria.probe: Are you currently using any quit medication or nicotine replacement, like varenicline, bupropion, or nicotine gum?

criteria.text: A skin condition that prevents wearing adhesive patches (for example severe eczema or psoriasis at the usual application sites).
criteria.probe: Do you have any skin condition that would keep you from wearing an adhesive patch on your arm or torso?

criteria.text: Currently enrolled in another interventional clinical trial or structured quit program.
criteria.probe: Are you currently enrolled in another clinical trial or a structured quit program?
